title: 页面列表
completionRule: Complete only when list/grid/thumb views, stable original page-index ordering, fixed legacy thumbnail geometry, visible thumbnail demand, search, follow mode, navigation, context actions, lifecycle and shared GUI/CLI/TUI page contracts have source-evidenced automated and Chromium proof.

sourceUiInventory.title: 搜索、跟随、视图与预热工具栏
文本、带图列表与缩略图网格
原始页面顺序与无本地排序控件
acceptanceItems: 按 book.pages 原始顺序构建 items
搜索过滤保持相对顺序
page.index 保持原始页面身份
列表/带图列表/缩略图网格使用同一顺序
阅读方向不在 Page List 内重排 catalog

sourceUiInventory.title: 固定缩略图 profile 与显示几何
acceptanceItems: 任何 XR profile 差异显式记录

sourceUiInventory.title: 当前页跟随、Slider 与页码跳转
acceptanceItems: 关闭跟随后保持预览索引
跟随模式拖动即时跳转

sourceUiInventory.title: 可见批次缩略图与全部预热
acceptanceItems: list 模式零缩略图请求

sourceUiInventory.title: 空、加载、错误、shell 与有界渲染
acceptanceItems: Card 无 session 零 DOM

sourceUiInventory.title: Page List Panel 与无标题 full-height Card
acceptanceItems: 统一 shell 偏离记录

sourceUiInventory.title: 跟随、三视图与预热 icon controls
总数、过滤数与预热三态
页码、当前页、条件与超分状态
复制、定位、系统打开与删除页面
键盘、稀疏虚拟化与两视口验收

items.title: list/grid/thumb 三种虚拟视图
items.targetContract: Text list, thumbnail list and three-column thumbnail grid preserve legacy hierarchy and use one sparse page catalog.
items.notes: All three sparse virtual modes use the shared thumbnail surface; remaining legacy context and upscale states keep this item partial.

items.title: 复用文件条目缩略图表面
items.targetContract: Page list and bookmark/folder entries share one accessible thumbnail surface while preserving page-specific contain fit and 3:4 geometry.
items.notes: Page, bookmark and bottom-strip media reuse ReaderThumbnailSurface while page thumbnails retain contain fit and page-specific geometry.

items.title: 搜索页面名称与页码
items.targetContract: Search is cancellable, generation-safe and returns a sparse virtual result set with totals.
items.notes: Server-side GUI search exists; headless parity remains incomplete.

items.title: 跟随进度与独立预览索引
items.targetContract: Follow mode centers and navigates with the active page; preview mode changes only the local preview position until commit.
items.notes: Focused and Chromium coverage freeze the legacy Slider split: follow-off changes preview only, while follow-on navigates each latest value. Canonical settings persistence remains pending.

items.title: Slider、页码输入与页面跳转
items.targetContract: Slider, numeric entry, Enter and row activation use the shared session navigation contract with strict bounds.
items.notes: Slider, row activation and bounded keyboard navigation are covered; the legacy numeric input and context actions remain incomplete.

items.title: 当前页与超分状态
items.targetContract: All renderers expose the active page consistently and show truthful upscale state only when backed by the current pipeline.
items.notes: Active state exists; upscale state is not wired in React.

items.title: 可取消的全部缩略图预热
items.targetContract: An explicit background action prewarms the complete page catalog with progress/error state and cancellation without delaying navigation.
items.notes: The source-compatible Sparkles action now prewarms the complete GUI catalog in sequential batches of at most 500 pages, publishes running/complete/error state, and cancels on session replacement or unmount. Explicit CLI/TUI commands and a 100K backend job corpus remain pending.

items.title: 页面上下文跳转与删除
items.targetContract: Directory and archive pages expose shared, confirmable, resource-safe delete behavior and clamp navigation afterward.
items.notes: No React page context menu exists.

items.title: 保持原始 page.index 页面顺序
items.targetContract: The Card exposes no local sorting control and preserves the book page catalog's original page.index order across list, detail, thumbnail and filtered result views; reading direction affects frame composition rather than reordering this catalog.
items.notes: The sparse catalog keeps result position separate from original page identity, and all three views consume that same ordered map without a local sorting control.

items.title: 保持固定 thumbnail profile 与 48x64 / 3:4 几何
items.targetContract: The Card exposes no thumbnail-size control, retains the legacy 256px request/key contract or records an explicit replacement profile, renders detail thumbnails at 48x64 with contain fit, and preserves a three-column 3:4 contain-fit thumbnail grid.
items.notes: Focused tests and both Chromium viewports freeze 48x64 contain-fit details and a three-column 3:4 contain-fit grid. XR intentionally reuses the canonical 320px page profile instead of the legacy 256px key to avoid a second thumbnail cache profile.

items.title: GUI/CLI/TUI 共用稀疏页面目录
items.targetContract: All surfaces share bounded page identity, original index order, name, media kind and thumbnail availability without materializing page content.
items.notes: GUI uses a bounded eight-batch sparse catalog around the active page while preserving original identity; shared context and prewarm commands remain incomplete.

items.title: 加载、空、错误、重试与预热状态
items.targetContract: Catalog and optional thumbnail/prewarm failures degrade independently with stable loading, empty and retry states.
items.notes: Empty books now settle to the empty state, catalog retry is bounded, and prewarm exposes running/complete/error feedback without hiding rows. Per-thumbnail retry and non-initial batch error isolation remain pending.

items.title: 取消目录与缩略图并忽略迟到结果
items.targetContract: Search, mode, session, collapse and unmount changes cancel obsolete catalog/thumbnail work and release owners.
items.notes: Catalog generations and background prewarm abort on replacement/unmount, while Slider navigation generations cannot continue into a replacement session. Explicit visible-thumbnail owner and collapsed request-count proof remain pending.

items.title: 保持页面列表 Card shell
items.targetContract: Page List remains independently lazy, non-hideable, collapsible, movable, resizable and window-capable.
items.notes: The independent PageNavigationCard chunk is frozen below 16 KiB by page-list.chunk. Shell parity remains partial until full-height, hidden-header, Card Window and all shared layout states have focused evidence.

items.title: 命名视图、页面与上下文动作
items.targetContract: Mode toggles, page rows, Slider, numeric jump and context actions have accessible names and full keyboard operation.
items.notes: Named listbox/option semantics, roving focus, Arrow/Home/End/PageUp/PageDown/Enter/Escape and Ctrl/Cmd+F are covered; the missing context menu keeps the item partial.

items.title: 保持缩略图比例、密度与当前页状态
items.targetContract: Legacy contain-fit thumbnails, exact 48x64 detail geometry, 3:4 grid tiles, page badges, current-page emphasis and responsive three-column geometry remain readable at desktop and 420x360.
items.notes: Desktop and 420x360 Chromium measure the exact 48x64 detail box and 3:4 three-column grid while proving page badges, current state and zero horizontal overflow.

items.title: 稀疏分页、可见缩略图与独立 chunk
items.targetContract: 10K/100K books retain bounded DOM and requests, list mode performs zero thumbnail work, and the Card remains a deferred chunk.
items.notes: A 100K catalog retains at most eight batches and list requests disable implicit prewarm. The Page Card remains a 13,714-byte deferred chunk; its 2,793-byte toolbar and 360-byte prewarm loop are second/third-level deferred chunks. A dedicated 100K Chromium scroll corpus remains pending.

items.title: 共享页面超分与条件状态
items.targetContract: The Card consumes one shared upscale snapshot for pending, processing, completed, skipped and failed states without starting another sampler.
items.notes: No React upscale snapshot is currently exposed.

items.title: 平台安全的页面文件动作
items.targetContract: Copy, reveal, system-open and directory/archive deletion run through authenticated application commands and atomically update the session catalog.
items.notes: Must not expose Tauri invokes or raw archive mutations in React.

items.title: 持久化跟随与页面列表视图
items.targetContract: Follow state and page-list-specific view preferences persist through canonical [nodes.neoview] settings.
items.notes: Current React state resets per mount.

items.title: 独立延迟 Page List chunk
items.targetContract: PageNavigationCard and its shared thumbnail primitive stay deferred and outside Reader entry/sidebar base chunks.
items.notes: Production audit requires independent deferred PageNavigationCard and ReaderThumbnailSurface chunks with 16 KiB and 4 KiB budgets.

items.title: 列表交互不重挂活动媒体
items.targetContract: Mode switches, scrolling, search and thumbnail loading preserve the active Reader media node and asset URL.
items.notes: Desktop and 420x360 Chromium prove complete-catalog prewarm and visible thumbnail decoding preserve the active image node, exact asset URL and request count; scrolling and search identity checks remain pending.

items.title: 记录 HTTP catalog 与共享 React 缩略图扩展
items.targetContract: Document sparse authenticated HTTP catalog and shared thumbnail primitives as XR implementations without removing legacy modes or actions.
items.notes: XR replaces the legacy in-process virtual list with an authenticated bounded sparse HTTP catalog, adds roving keyboard focus, and reuses the canonical 320px thumbnail profile while preserving all three legacy renderers and display geometry.
